findings.brutal_summary: A 400-line monstrosity masquerading as a 'seamless' context switch. More complex than the neural pathways of an actual ADHD brain.

savage_analysis.reality_check: Promises '50% reduction in switching overhead' but requires 400 lines to explain how to switch tasks. The irony is thicc.
savage_analysis.technical_debt: Creates more context than it saves. Like using a helicopter to cross the street.
savage_analysis.usability_disaster: If you have ADHD and can read 400 lines without getting distracted, you don't need this command.

findings.brutal_summary: Meta-complexity inception: A complex system to determine if things are too complex. Peak programmer recursion madness.

savage_analysis.irony_level: MAXIMUM - Uses 500 lines to decide if tasks need deep thinking
savage_analysis.complexity_paradox: Score: 24/30 complexity. Fails its own routing logic by being too complex for XML thinking.
savage_analysis.practical_failure: Would route itself to MCP for analysis, creating infinite loops of self-analysis
savage_analysis.engineering_sin: Solves a problem that doesn't exist by creating 10 new problems

findings.brutal_summary: The Tolstoy novel of thinking commands. 673 lines of 'interactive' thinking that would take longer to read than to actually think.

savage_analysis.length_insanity: 673 lines. War & Peace has better pacing and more practical value.
savage_analysis.interactive_lie: Claims 'one-at-a-time questioning' then presents 50+ question templates simultaneously
savage_analysis.confidence_scam: Promises 95% confidence through 5 phases. Real confidence would be deleting this file.
savage_analysis.execution_impossibility: Contains more JavaScript pseudocode than actual executable commands

efficiency_ratios.adhd_context_switch_vs_ls: 1423x more tokens for 0.15x usefulness = 9487x efficiency loss
efficiency_ratios.adaptive_router_vs_ls: 1710x more tokens for 0.11x usefulness = 15545x efficiency loss
efficiency_ratios.ultrathink_vs_ls: 2446x more tokens for 0.07x usefulness = 34943x efficiency loss

cost_benefit_analysis.opportunity_cost: Could have executed 5580 simple bash commands in the time it takes to read ultrathink-interactive

immediate_actions: DELETE ultrathink-interactive.md immediately - it's beyond salvation
Reduce adaptive-complexity-router by 90% or scrap entirely
Rewrite adhd-context-switch as 10-line bash script maximum
systematic_fixes: Add complexity scoring with automatic rejection > 10

savage_conclusions.evidence: Average 297 lines per command for tasks that should take 3 lines
savage_conclusions.final_roast: These commands are the software equivalent of using a Formula 1 car to deliver pizza - massively over-engineered, impossibly complex, and completely missing the point.
